summary: Completed frontend testing of 6 new premium pages for Ceylon Canvas Art Marketplace. All pages render correctly with proper data-testid attributes, navigation works from both Navbar Services dropdown and Footer Collectors section. Interactive elements (forms, buttons, tracking search) all functional.

page_rendering: /investment-guide - Hero section with 'Art as an Alternative Asset' visible
/private-services - Services grid with 6 service cards visible
/private-services - Membership tiers (Collector Circle, Private Client, Institutional) visible
/private-services - Consultation form with all fields visible
/referral-program - Hero section with 'Share the Gift of Art' visible
/referral-program - Share options (Email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Twitter) visible
/track-order - Tracking form with input field visible
/track-order - Tracking search returns mock timeline result
/how-it-works - Collector steps (Discover, Curate, Acquire, Receive) visible
/press - Featured coverage section with FT, AMM, AN visible
navigation_tests: Navbar Services dropdown - Investment Guide link visible
Navbar Services dropdown - Private Services link visible
Navbar Services dropdown - How It Works link visible
Navbar Services dropdown - Referral Program link visible
Footer Collectors section - Investment Guide link visible
Footer Collectors section - Private Services link visible
Footer Collectors section - How It Works link visible
Footer Collectors section - Referral Program link visible
Footer Collectors section - Track Order link visible
Footer Collectors section - Press link visible
Footer link navigation - Investment Guide link navigates correctly
interactive_elements: Investment Guide - 'Explore Collection' CTA button visible and clickable
Investment Guide - 'Private Advisory' CTA button visible
Private Services - Name input field visible and functional
Private Services - Email input field visible and functional
Private Services - 'Request Consultation' submit button visible
Referral Program - 'Join Now & Get Your Link' CTA visible for non-auth users
Order Tracking - Tracking input accepts order number
Order Tracking - Search returns shipment timeline with mock data

seed_data_creation: None - Static frontend pages with mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new premium pages (InvestmentGuidePage, PrivateServicesPage, ReferralProgramPage, OrderTrackingPage, HowItWorksPage, PressPage) are fully functional. Routes configured in App.js, navigation links added to Navbar Services dropdown and Footer Collectors section. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing. Order tracking page uses mock data for demonstration. Private Services consultation form is frontend-only (simulated submission). Referral Program shows different UI for authenticated vs non-authenticated users.

investment_guide_page.details: Hero, stats bar, benefits grid, Sri Lanka opportunity section, process steps, CTA sections all rendering correctly

private_services_page.details: Services grid, membership tiers with featured highlight, testimonial, consultation form all rendering correctly

referral_program_page.details: Hero with referral link (for auth users), stats bar, how it works steps, reward tiers, share options, FAQ all rendering correctly

order_tracking_page.details: Tracking form, mock tracking result with timeline, shipping features section all rendering correctly

how_it_works_page.details: Collector steps, video section, artist steps, trust features, FAQ all rendering correctly

press_page.details: Featured coverage, pull quote, press releases, awards, media kit downloads, press contact all rendering correctly

navbar_services_dropdown.details: All 4 links (Investment Guide, Private Services, How It Works, Referral Program) visible in dropdown

footer_collectors_section.details: All 6 links (Investment Guide, Private Services, How It Works, Referral Program, Track Order, Press) visible and navigating correctly

design_quality_notes.overall: Premium luxury aesthetic maintained across all pages
design_quality_notes.spacing: Consistent padding and margins across sections
design_quality_notes.contrast: Good text contrast on all backgrounds
